title: Field Escort (Design Concept)
description: Concept: verify a crop shipment route via chained waypoint commitments. Not yet implemented.

designInputs.routeCommitments: Ordered list of waypoint hashes (private route)

designOutputs.escortValid: Boolean — all waypoints visited in order

note: Design concept only. This file documents the intended proof format for future implementation.
